entries.text: Bellows can speed up the smelting process.
Carpets can be placed on stairs.
Potions can be mixed in a normal Cauldron.
Sleeping in a well-furnished room can give you stat boosts.
Owls can be used to deliver messages and packages to other players or depots.
Plate armor protects you very well from many dangers.
The sun rises in the east and sets in the west.
It gets colder up north.
With fodder, animals will automatically breed during the right seasons.
Wearing heavier armor makes it less easy to dodge attacks.
Paper can be made from sugar cane or tree bark.
You can crawl by pressing 'X.'
You can sit on stairs and slabs.
You can carry up to two sacks at a time.
Donkeys, Mules, Sniffers & Elephants can carry chests.
Lances & Sabers do more damage whilst on horseback.
Traveling in a straight line is very impractical; try getting vantage points and exploring thoroughly.
You can hide in leaves and safely land on them.
Falling into shallow water can kill you.
Polar Bears can be tamed with Cod. It can also be ridden.
The Imperial Guardian's weak spot is its exposed back.
Corpses decompose after 3 days. The loot does not disappear.
A season passes after 28 days.
Map Atlases can be crafted with a scaled map. It will use fewer maps and map out a larger area.
Black Steel can be found in the north.
The Notes for the Survivalist contains many useful tips.
